case_title: JOW RUBY VS LAU MING YUEN

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JOW RUBY AS TO DEFENDANT LAU MING YUEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 02
POS TO DEF. NOT SERVED 10 DAYS PRIOR TO HRG.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOW RUBY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAU MING YUEN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $43.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,043.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LAU MING YUEN
